title: Minute clerks of first city court
doc_html:
§2155.  Minute clerks of first city court

Three deputy clerks of the first city court may be assigned to act as minute clerks and shall perform such other clerical duties as the respective judges shall direct.  

Acts 1960, No. 32, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
